title: Introduction
html:
Pacific Settlement Bank (PSB) represents a new era in institutional finance. Established to provide the bridge between traditional capital markets and the digital asset ecosystem, PSB operates as a premier hybrid financial institution under the Sovereign Financial Framework Act.

Our mission is to ensure price stability and sound financial systems in support of sustainable economic growth across Oceania and the Pacific Financial Governance District (PFGD).

title: FX Auction
html:
The Sovereign Gateway to Multimodal Liquidity

PSB conducts bespoke asset auctions engineered for central banks, sovereign wealth funds, and accredited institutional investors. Our auction engine utilizes the Pacific Ledger protocol for T+0 settlement across 11 regional nodes.

Auction Pillars

  • Multimodal Liquidity Pools (Fiat, Digital, Precious Metals)
  • Sovereign-Tier Exclusivity ($25M+ Minimum Mandate)
  • Quantum-Secure Auction Platform (QSAP)

title: Wealth Management
html:
The Philosophy of Capital Preservation

PSB Wealth Management operates at the intersection of Swiss fiduciary traditions and post-quantum digital security. We serve a curated circle of sovereign wealth funds and multinational family offices.

Core Pillars

  • Multi-Jurisdictional Trust Structuring: Impenetrable structures across 11 strategic nodes.
  • Pacific Ledger Custody: Quantum-resistant cold storage for multi-asset portfolios.
  • Global Family Office Support: Infrastructure for private jet financing, maritime insurance, and tax-neutral liquidations.

title: Regulatory Oversight
html:
PSB operates under a multi-layered regulatory architecture. Our primary mandate is derived from the Sovereign Financial Framework Act (2011), establishing PSB as the foundational clearing house of the Pacific Financial Governance District (PFGD).

  • FATF & OECD Alignment (Rule 15b compliance).
  • Real-time oversight via the Pacific Ledger.
  • Quantum-resistant data sovereignty.
